subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! Though His thrall thou art, yet sovereign of the world art thou, for thou art a bond-slave of the Abhá Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم غلام او هستی ولی سرور عالم زیرا بنده حلقه بگوش جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer
